title: Agent Login with MFA
description: Verify that an agent can successfully log in using multi-factor authentication.
testDescription: An agent attempts to log in using valid credentials and completes MFA.
prerequisites: Agent account must exist and be configured for MFA.
stepsToPerform:
1. Navigate to the login page on the Call Center system.
2. Enter valid username and password.
3. Receive MFA code via registered method.
4. Enter MFA code and submit.
expectedResult: Agent is logged in and redirected to the dashboard. MFA success is logged in the Backend.

title: Customer Verification via OTP
description: Verify customer identity using OTP sent to registered contact.
testDescription: A customer is verified using an OTP sent to their registered phone number.
prerequisites: Customer must have a registered phone number.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent initiates customer verification in Call Center.
2. System sends OTP to customer's phone.
3. Customer provides OTP to agent.
4. Agent enters OTP in the system.
expectedResult: Customer is verified successfully, and verification is logged in the Backend.

title: Sensitive Profile Change - Email Update
description: Verify that email updates require re-authentication and are logged.
testDescription: An agent updates a customer's email address, requiring re-authentication.
prerequisites: Customer account must exist with a valid email.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent accesses customer profile in Call Center.
2. Initiate email update.
3. System prompts for re-authentication.
4. Agent re-authenticates.
5. Enter new email and submit.
expectedResult: Email is updated, and the change is logged with re-authentication details in the Backend.

title: Payment Transfer with Beneficiary Addition
description: Verify that a payment transfer with a new beneficiary is processed securely.
testDescription: An agent processes a payment transfer, adding a new beneficiary.
prerequisites: Agent must have authorization to process payments.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent initiates payment transfer in Call Center.
2. Add new beneficiary details.
3. System prompts for beneficiary verification.
4. Complete verification and submit transfer.
expectedResult: Transfer is processed, and beneficiary addition is logged in the Backend.

title: Card Block/Unblock
description: Verify that card blocking and unblocking actions are logged and require authorization.
testDescription: An agent blocks and then unblocks a customer's card.
prerequisites: Customer must have an active card.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent accesses card management in Call Center.
2. Initiate card block.
3. System logs block action.
4. Initiate card unblock.
5. System logs unblock action.
expectedResult: Card is blocked and unblocked successfully, with actions logged in the Backend.

title: Case/Dispute Creation
description: Verify that case creation for disputes is logged and requires necessary details.
testDescription: An agent creates a dispute case for a customer transaction.
prerequisites: Customer must have a transaction eligible for dispute.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent accesses dispute management in Call Center.
2. Select transaction for dispute.
3. Enter dispute details and submit.
expectedResult: Dispute case is created, and details are logged in the Backend.

title: Call Recording Access Control
description: Verify that access to call recordings is controlled and audited.
testDescription: An agent accesses and plays a call recording.
prerequisites: Agent must have authorization to access call recordings.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent navigates to call recordings in Call Center.
2. Search for specific recording.
3. Play recording.
expectedResult: Recording is played, and access is logged in the Backend.

title: Secure Error Handling
description: Verify that error messages do not expose sensitive information.
testDescription: An agent encounters an error during a transaction.
prerequisites: System must have error handling mechanisms in place.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent performs a transaction that triggers an error.
2. Observe error message displayed.
expectedResult: Error message is generic and does not expose sensitive information. Error is logged in the Backend.

title: Session Timeout and Re-authentication
description: Verify that sessions timeout after inactivity and require re-authentication.
testDescription: An agent's session times out after a period of inactivity.
prerequisites: Agent must be logged in.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent remains inactive for the session timeout period.
2. Attempt to perform an action after timeout.
expectedResult: Agent is logged out and must re-authenticate to continue. Session timeout is logged in the Backend.

title: Authorization and Role-Based Access Control
description: Verify that actions are restricted based on agent roles.
testDescription: An agent attempts to perform an action outside their role permissions.
prerequisites: Agent must have a defined role with specific permissions.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent attempts to access a restricted feature in Call Center.
2. Observe system response.
expectedResult: Access is denied, and attempt is logged in the Backend.

title: Agent Account Lockout After Failed Login Attempts
description: Verify that an agent account is locked after a specified number of failed login attempts.
testDescription: An agent attempts to log in with incorrect credentials multiple times, triggering account lockout.
prerequisites: Agent account must exist and have a lockout policy configured.
stepsToPerform:
1. Navigate to the login page on the Call Center system.
2. Enter incorrect username and password.
3. Repeat step 2 until the lockout threshold is reached.
4. Attempt to log in again.
expectedResult: Agent account is locked after the specified number of failed attempts, and lockout is logged in the Backend.

title: Customer Verification with Incorrect OTP
description: Verify that customer verification fails with an incorrect OTP.
testDescription: A customer provides an incorrect OTP during verification.
prerequisites: Customer must have a registered phone number.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent initiates customer verification in Call Center.
2. System sends OTP to customer's phone.
3. Customer provides an incorrect OTP to agent.
4. Agent enters incorrect OTP in the system.
expectedResult: Verification fails, and the failed attempt is logged in the Backend.

title: Sensitive Profile Change - Phone Number Update
description: Verify that phone number updates require re-authentication and are logged.
testDescription: An agent updates a customer's phone number, requiring re-authentication.
prerequisites: Customer account must exist with a valid phone number.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent accesses customer profile in Call Center.
2. Initiate phone number update.
3. System prompts for re-authentication.
4. Agent re-authenticates.
5. Enter new phone number and submit.
expectedResult: Phone number is updated, and the change is logged with re-authentication details in the Backend.

title: Unauthorized Payment Transfer Attempt
description: Verify that unauthorized payment transfer attempts are blocked and logged.
testDescription: An agent without payment processing authorization attempts to initiate a payment transfer.
prerequisites: Agent must have a role without payment processing permissions.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent attempts to initiate a payment transfer in Call Center.
2. Observe system response.
expectedResult: Transfer attempt is blocked, and the unauthorized attempt is logged in the Backend.

title: Session Hijack Prevention
description: Verify that session hijacking is prevented by invalidating old sessions upon new login.
testDescription: An agent logs in from a new device, invalidating the session on the old device.
prerequisites: Agent must be logged in on one device.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent logs in from a new device.
2. Attempt to perform an action on the old device.
expectedResult: Session on the old device is invalidated, and the new session is active. Session change is logged in the Backend.

title: Audit Trail for Sensitive Actions
description: Verify that all sensitive actions are recorded in an immutable audit trail.
testDescription: An agent performs a series of sensitive actions, which are logged for audit purposes.
prerequisites: Agent must have authorization to perform sensitive actions.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent performs a sensitive action in Call Center.
2. Verify that the action is logged in the Backend audit trail.
expectedResult: Sensitive actions are logged with details such as timestamp, agent ID, and action type.

title: Replay OTP Attack Prevention
description: Verify that OTPs cannot be reused for verification.
testDescription: An agent attempts to verify a customer using a previously used OTP.
prerequisites: Customer must have a registered phone number and a previously used OTP.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent initiates customer verification in Call Center.
2. Customer provides a previously used OTP.
3. Agent enters the reused OTP in the system.
expectedResult: Verification fails, and the reuse attempt is logged in the Backend.

title: Privilege Escalation Attempt Detection
description: Verify that attempts to escalate privileges are detected and logged.
testDescription: An agent attempts to access features outside their role permissions.
prerequisites: Agent must have a defined role with specific permissions.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent attempts to access a restricted feature in Call Center.
2. Observe system response.
expectedResult: Access is denied, and the privilege escalation attempt is logged in the Backend.

title: PII Masking Verification
description: Verify that personally identifiable information is masked appropriately.
testDescription: An agent views customer information, ensuring PII is masked according to policy.
prerequisites: Customer account must exist with PII data.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent accesses customer profile in Call Center.
2. Verify that PII such as PAN and phone number are masked.
expectedResult: PII is displayed in a masked format, and access is logged in the Backend.

title: Secure Data Handling in Asynchronous Operations
description: Verify secure handling of data in asynchronous operations with retries.
testDescription: An agent initiates an operation that involves asynchronous data handling.
prerequisites: System must support asynchronous operations with retry mechanisms.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent initiates an asynchronous operation in Call Center.
2. System performs retries if initial attempt fails.
3. Verify final operation status.
expectedResult: Operation completes successfully or fails securely, with retries logged in the Backend.

title: Agent Password Reset via Security Questions
description: Verify that an agent can reset their password using security questions.
testDescription: An agent attempts to reset their password by answering security questions correctly.
prerequisites: Agent account must exist with security questions set up.
stepsToPerform:
1. Navigate to the password reset page on the Call Center system.
2. Enter username and request password reset.
3. Answer security questions correctly.
4. Enter new password and confirm.
expectedResult: Password is reset successfully, and the action is logged in the Backend.

title: Agent Role Change Approval Process
description: Verify that changes to an agent's role require supervisor approval.
testDescription: A supervisor approves a role change request for an agent.
prerequisites: Agent role change request must be initiated.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent initiates role change request in Call Center.
2. Supervisor receives notification of role change request.
3. Supervisor reviews and approves the request.
expectedResult: Role change is approved and updated in the system, with actions logged in the Backend.

title: Customer Account Deactivation
description: Verify that customer account deactivation requires confirmation and is logged.
testDescription: An agent deactivates a customer's account after confirmation.
prerequisites: Customer account must exist and be active.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent accesses customer account in Call Center.
2. Initiate account deactivation.
3. Confirm deactivation action.
expectedResult: Account is deactivated, and the action is logged in the Backend.

title: Agent Access to Transaction History
description: Verify that agent access to customer transaction history is logged and controlled.
testDescription: An agent views a customer's transaction history.
prerequisites: Agent must have authorization to view transaction history.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent accesses customer profile in Call Center.
2. Navigate to transaction history section.
3. View transaction details.
expectedResult: Transaction history is displayed, and access is logged in the Backend.

title: Failed Login Attempt Notification
description: Verify that agents receive notifications after multiple failed login attempts.
testDescription: An agent receives a notification after several failed login attempts.
prerequisites: Agent account must exist with notification settings configured.
stepsToPerform:
1. Attempt to log in with incorrect credentials multiple times.
2. Observe notification sent to the agent.
expectedResult: Agent receives a notification about failed login attempts, and attempts are logged in the Backend.

title: Agent Access to Sensitive Reports
description: Verify that access to sensitive reports is restricted and audited.
testDescription: An agent attempts to access a sensitive report.
prerequisites: Agent must have a role with restricted access to sensitive reports.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent navigates to reports section in Call Center.
2. Attempt to access a sensitive report.
expectedResult: Access is denied, and the attempt is logged in the Backend.

title: Customer Address Change with Verification
description: Verify that address changes require verification and are logged.
testDescription: An agent updates a customer's address, requiring verification.
prerequisites: Customer account must exist with a valid address.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent accesses customer profile in Call Center.
2. Initiate address change.
3. System prompts for verification.
4. Complete verification and submit.
expectedResult: Address is updated, and the change is logged with verification details in the Backend.

title: Agent Logout from All Devices
description: Verify that an agent can log out from all devices simultaneously.
testDescription: An agent logs out from all active sessions across devices.
prerequisites: Agent must be logged in on multiple devices.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent accesses account settings in Call Center.
2. Select 'Logout from all devices' option.
3. Confirm logout action.
expectedResult: Agent is logged out from all devices, and the action is logged in the Backend.

title: Agent Access to Customer Notes
description: Verify that access to customer notes is controlled and audited.
testDescription: An agent views notes on a customer's account.
prerequisites: Agent must have authorization to view customer notes.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent accesses customer profile in Call Center.
2. Navigate to notes section.
3. View customer notes.
expectedResult: Customer notes are displayed, and access is logged in the Backend.

title: Agent Session Termination on Password Change
description: Verify that all active sessions are terminated when an agent changes their password.
testDescription: An agent changes their password, terminating all active sessions.
prerequisites: Agent must be logged in on multiple devices.
stepsToPerform:
1. Agent accesses account settings in Call Center.
2. Change password and confirm.
3. Attempt to perform an action on another device.
expectedResult: All sessions are terminated, and the password change is logged in the Backend.
